channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: University of Alberta athletes Abby Guezen and Ryder Rattee win top U Sports honours in 2026
item.description: The University of Alberta achieved a remarkable feat in Canadian university sports as volleyball star Abby Guezen and sprinter Ryder Rattee claimed the top U Sports awards for 2026. Guezen was named f...

item.title: 031 Theatre Festival Showcases a Variety of Family-Friendly Performances
item.description: The fourth annual 031 Theatre Festival returns to Seabrooke's Theatre at DHS from 4 to 14 June, offering a vibrant mix of South African theatre. The festival features comedy, drama, music, and solo pe...

item.title: Supreme Court to Hear Imran Khan’s Petitions After Eid

item.title: Astronomers Discover Unexpected Magnetic Reversal in the Milky Way's Sagittarius Arm
item.description: Researchers at the University of Calgary have uncovered a previously hidden magnetic structure within the Milky Way, revealing a diagonal magnetic field reversal in the Sagittarius Arm. Utilizing the ...

item.title: Grace Kelly’s 1956 Wedding Dress: Design, Legacy, and Influence
item.description: Grace Kelly’s wedding dress, worn during her marriage to Prince Rainier III of Monaco on April 19, 1956, remains one of the most iconic bridal gowns of the 20th century. Designed by Helen Rose of MGM,...

item.title: River Joseph’s Journey from Microfilm to Major Film Release ‘Tayo Sa Wakas’
item.description: River Joseph, a rising talent in the Philippine entertainment industry, has made an inspiring journey from creating microfilms to starring in a major film production titled 'Tayo Sa Wakas.' His career...

item.title: How to Identify and Avoid CRA-Related Scams in Canada
item.description: Scammers in Canada are increasingly impersonating the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) to defraud taxpayers. One of the latest tactics involves sending text messages claiming a tax refund is available via ...

item.title: Joint Nigeria-US operation eliminates 175 Islamic State fighters in northeast Nigeria
item.description: A coordinated military operation between Nigerian and US forces has successfully neutralised at least 175 Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP) militants, including key leaders, in the northeast ...

item.title: Durban residents march over concerns about municipal budget and service tariffs
item.description: On Wednesday, Durban residents took to the streets to protest against the eThekwini Municipality’s proposed 2026/2027 budget and planned service tariff increases, citing concerns that these measures w...

item.title: Harvard introduces measures to curb rising grade inflation
item.description: Harvard University has unveiled a series of reforms aimed at addressing the ongoing issue of grade inflation among its students. The university administration highlighted that over the past decade, a ...

item.title: ATRenew Inc. Reports Strong Q1 2026 Earnings, Revenue Up 40% Year-Over-Year
item.description: ATRenew Inc. (RERE) announced its first-quarter results for 2026, exceeding analyst expectations on both earnings per share and revenue. The company reported a Q1 EPS of $0.09, surpassing estimates by...

item.title: London bus driver dies following assault on Battersea Bridge
item.description: A London bus driver, Sergei Krajev, aged 64, has tragically passed away after being assaulted while on duty. The incident occurred just after midnight on Monday on Battersea Bridge. Emergency services...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte Urges Philippine Navy to Defend National Maritime Territory

item.title: APC conducts state assembly primaries amid consensus arrangements and protests
item.description: Primaries of the All Progressives Congress (APC) held across several Nigerian states on Wednesday produced a mix of returning and new candidates. In Kaduna State, top lawmakers like Speaker Dahiru Lim...

item.title: Anne Sullivan and Helen Keller: A Lifelong Story of Education and Perseverance
item.description: The friendship between Anne Sullivan and Helen Keller stands as a remarkable example of human resilience and the transformative power of education. In 1882, Helen Keller, at just nineteen months old, ...

item.title: Trump DOJ indictment of Raúl Castro signals broader strategy toward Cuba
item.description: The Trump administration's Department of Justice recently indicted Cuban leader Raúl Castro for a 1996 airplane shootdown that killed four men, including three Americans. Legal expert Melba Pearson, a...

item.title: Five-Year-Old Tragically Killed by Overturned Skip Bin at Newcastle Flats
item.description: A tragic accident occurred on Friday at the Suryaville municipal flats in Jasmine Crescent, Newcastle, north-west of Durban, when five-year-old Kiara Mohan was fatally crushed by a municipal skip bin....

item.title: First-time voters face pressure as exams and local elections coincide

item.title: Three People Die and Several First Responders Hospitalised After Suspected Overdose Incident in New Mexico Home
item.description: In Mountainair, New Mexico, authorities responded to a serious incident on Wednesday morning after four individuals were found unresponsive in a private residence. Three of them have tragically died, ...

item.title: SpaceX IPO Filing Highlights AI Investments, Starship Development, and Elon Musk's Leadership
item.description: SpaceX, founded by Elon Musk 24 years ago, has publicly filed for its IPO, setting the stage for one of the largest offerings in history. The S-1 filing reveals a diversified technology company that e...
